instruction: email to blue harbor bank with subject "Security review follow-up" and body "Checking in on the open security review. Happy to answer questions and align on next steps."

cat 01_notes/blue-harbor-bank.md
# Blue Harbor Bank

## Journal

Blue Harbor Bank started from a compliance-led pilot, so the real buyer energy has always been balanced by security, legal, and architecture caution. They reserved budget because the internal service request use case was credible, but every next step still routes through formal review.

This is not the kind of account where optimistic language helps. Better to stay conservative, name the review gates clearly, and avoid implying tha
